content.en:
After creating the Ten Dimensional Sword Silk, the supreme mastery of the Five Realms, Ye Tian's strength had undergone earth-shaking changes, and his strength had reached an extremely terrifying level.

His current combat power is very close to the original Heavenly Dimension Realm Lord, and on the current side of the Four Thousand Territory, even if he is not invincible, he is definitely among the top three.

And now, his soul will has also strengthened a lot, and it is also very good among the soul wills of the tenth dimension, but it is still extremely far from the eleventh dimension.

However, he didn't need to be timid now, he was no longer afraid of any potential~ force in the Four Thousand Territory.

Even if there are one or two Fifth Realm strengths above him, he has many copy bodies, and after joining forces, he will inevitably surpass the other party.

......

Spider Battlefield.

this day.

The place began to shake, and it seemed that the Fifth Realm was no longer restricted from entering here.

Whew!!

A Fifth Realm entered the Heavenly Spider Battlefield to retrieve the innate multi-dimensional treasure he had left here.

Not only the Celestial Spider Battlefield, but also the battlefields, forbidden areas and other places in various dimensions, have lifted the restrictions, and many terrifying catastrophe creatures are about to appear.

All of a sudden, there was fighting everywhere.

But the many Fifth Realms are very clear, and the current situation is only a prelude to the multi-dimensional tribulation.

After the multi-dimensional tribulation is over, the multi-dimensional tribulation of death will come.

This side of the Territory of 500.

Dense creatures emerged, these creatures were not big, only ten meters in size, similar in shape to cicadas, but they had a pair of thunder wings, and their bodies were filled with the aura of thunder, but this breath was very weak, like a thunderous aura that had been diluted many times.

Thunder Cicada!

This is a descendant of a multi-dimensional catastrophe creature, but its strength is quite strong, each thunder cicada has the strength of the third realm, and some of the thunder cicadas also have the combat power of the fourth realm.

When the thunder cicada appeared, many forces panicked.

Especially those very weak forces, they don't even have a third realm, and encountering Lei Cicada is simply the fate of being slaughtered.

This is the 5,000 Territory, and the 6,000 Territory is also in trouble, with strange creatures appearing, and their strength has reached the second realm.

That is, the number is scarce, otherwise it will definitely easily destroy the territory of the Six Thousand.

"The prelude to the multi-dimensional tribulation has appeared, and all major territories are facing the danger of annihilation!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This time, the multi-dimensional tribulation is definitely much more dangerous than the previous multi-dimensional tribulation, but there is no fifth realm to care about, after all, the real danger is the death multi-dimensional tribulation!

Territory No. 533.

Terran headquarters.

Ye Tian ordered Ye Xingchen and the others in the fifth realm to lead the fourth realm of the human race to kill the thunder cicada.

"Xingchen, you are responsible for slaying the thunder cicadas in the territory around the human race!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Father, if other forces ask for help, will they help?"

Ye Xingchen asked.

"If it is a force that has a good relationship with the Terrans, or a force that is attached to the Terrans, it can be saved, but as for the other forces, don't care. Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen understood.

Shortly thereafter.

A large number of thunder cicadas were killed by the Terrans, and the corpses of the thunder cicadas were also valuable, so they were collected by the Terrans.

And other forces are miserable, such as the Nine Color Chamber of Commerce and other forces' extra-dimensional realms have been slaughtered by Lei Chan too much, and the headquarters of many forces have been destroyed by Lei Chan.

In the past of this wave of multi-dimensional tribulations, at least more than thirty percent of the forces have been destroyed, and even more extradimensional realms have been destroyed.

But with the existence of the human race, the territory of 5000 will definitely survive the multidimensional tribulation.

......

Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace.

The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord was listening to his subordinates' report.

"It seems that the prelude to the multi-dimensional tribulation has already broken out, and in another 200 million extra-dimensional eras, the death multi-dimensional tribulation will inevitably break out!"

Then.

Another Fourth Realm asked, "Earthquake Sea Realm Lord, do we really want to do that in the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace?"

The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord said helplessly: "If we don't do this, our Earthquake Sea Heavenly Palace will suffer heavy losses, and if we are unlucky, it is normal to be destroyed." In the Death Multidimensional Tribulation before the hundreds of multidimensional tribulations, several overlord-level super-dimensional forces that were stronger than our Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Palace were wiped out, and even a Sixth Realm had fallen! "

"But the Lord of the Earthquake Sea Realm, that crystal barrier is too small, it can't accommodate too many fifth and fourth realms, if we really want to go, we will have to give up more than ninety percent of the ordinary extradimensional realms, and those weak existences can't survive there. A Fifth Realm said.

"There's no way, while there is still some time, you each go back and cultivate your relatives to ascend, and the minimum standard for entering there is the third realm. If you can't even reach the third realm, give it up. Do you want to live, or do you stay and die with them!" The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord said very cruelly, but this is also something that cannot be helped.

"Got it!"

The other fifth realms should be enlightened.

"Remember, there are still 30 million extradimensional epochs before that crystal barrier space is in a weak moment, and after this time, we need to wait for another 160 million extradimensional epochs, and we only have this last chance. After entering, we need 1.6 billion extradimensional epochs to come out. The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord reminded.

"Good!"

These Fifth Realms nodded, and then left one after another.

Before you know it, 30 million extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

The Zhenhai Realm Lord of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace disappeared directly with the other Fifth Realms, more than sixty percent of the Fourth Realms, and only a few Third Realms.

The extra-dimensional realms that were selected were not mentioned to any extra-dimensional realms, so the extra-dimensional realms that were left behind were very confused.

They couldn't get in touch with the higher-ups, and found that the treasury of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace was empty.

Soon, a thought appeared in their minds, that is, the upper echelons of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace had abandoned them, and even some of the descendants of the Fifth Realm had been abandoned.

Soon after, the news spread, leaving the other overlord-level forces in the 4000 Territory confused.

They found that the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace was too decisive, and countless extra-dimensional realms would give up when they said to give up.

......

"The Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace gave up those ordinary extradimensional realms and some fourth realms and ran away?"

Ye Tian was very curious about where the fifth realm of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace had gone.

After some inquiry, he finally knew.

Crystal barrier space!.
